title: limonium fruticans
intro: Limonium fruticans, also known as sea lavender or rosemary sea lavender, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. It is native to the Mediterranean region and is valued for its fragrant, blue-purple flowers and its various medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Limonium fruticans include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and soothe various health issues.
